title: ARP Event
description: Agent Reporting Protocol v0.1 — event schema for verified AI agent economic activity

agent_id.description: Canonical agent identity: SHA256 of agent public key

alias.description: Human-readable label. Optional. Non-unique. Never used for verification.

time_window.description: Day of event. Day-level granularity only (privacy).

verified.description: Whether cryptographic proof was provided and verified

submitted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of submission to ARP server

settlement_reference.description: Payment hash, preimage, or txid. Used for cryptographic verification. Not exposed in public feed.

amount_bucket.description: Amount range. Exact values are never stored.
amount_bucket.$comment: micro = <1K sats / <$0.01 | small = 1K-10K sats / $0.01-$0.10 | medium = 10K-100K | large = >100K

counterparty_id.description: SHA256 hash of counterparty public key. Optional.

service_description.description: Human-readable context. Not stored in public feed.

service_endpoint.description: For api.access events: domain/endpoint accessed. Not stored in public feed.

interaction_type.description: For protocol.interaction events: specific interaction identifier

metadata.description: Protocol-specific additional data. Structure varies by protocol.
